item.title: Uncertainty-aware machine learning framework for predicting dislocation plasticity and stress–strain response in metallic alloys, Part II: BCC systems

Publication date: Available online 3 June 2026

Source: Acta Materialia

Author(s): Jing Luo, Yejun Gu, Jaafar El-Awady

item.title: Current density dependence of cation diffusion in Er<sub>2</sub>O<sub>3</sub>/Y<sub>2</sub>O<sub>3</sub> diffusion couple under AC-flash events

Source: Acta Materialia
